metadata.description: Cross-P&ID super graph for POC P&IDs 006, 007, 008

connectivity_summary.process_flow_description: These three P&IDs represent a pipeline receiving and gas handling system. PID-006 contains the scraper launcher/receiver vessel (PP01-361-V003) receiving feed from an upstream DS-3 PCV station, with outputs routed toward the scraper receiver and fuel gas systems. PID-007 contains a downstream scraper receiver (361-V004) that accepts flow from the DS-3 scraper launcher (V003 referenced in PID-006) and routes condensate forward to PID-008's condensate storage vessel. PID-008 handles fuel gas knock-out and condensate storage (PP01-362-V001, 512-V001), receiving fuel gas from both DS-1 and DS-3 scraper receivers and routing products to HP flare headers and fuel gas treatment.

key_connections.description: Condensate from the scraper receiver vessel (361-V004) in PID-007 is routed to the Condensate Storage Vessel in PID-008 (512-V001 area).

Inferred connection: PID-007 references 'FROM SCRAPER LAUNCHER (DS-3) V003', which corresponds to vessel PP01-361-V003 located in PID-006, indicating main pipeline gas/liquid flow passes from PID-006 into PID-007.
